creator: dada@sbox.tu-graz.ac.at
text:
FreeBSD's syscons driver supports 132 character modes. However
	there are no suitable termcap entries available.

Fix: I'm not sure if this patch fits established naming conventions.
	Also I left mono and russion versions out for now.
How-To-Repeat: 
	vidcontrol VESA_132x43
	tput li
	tput co
	export TERM=cons43
	tput li
	tput co
